markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off the client ops cycle and onboard new team members.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Onboarding Focus:** The cycle's top priority is onboarding new team members (Tamyres, Sergey, Isaac) via pairing sessions on key tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Agentic Pipeline Closure:** The team will finalize the multi-month agentic pipeline migration, closing any tickets lacking client feedback by EOW to clear the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Framer Workflow Debug:** A persistent, intermittent Framer publishing bug will be debugged. The primary hypothesis is user error (failing to keep the MCP plugin open), but a workflow-side parsing issue is also suspected.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**New Tech Adoption:** The team will push for wider adoption of the new "Nano Banana" image generation workflow, which produces high-quality, on-brand infographics with minimal effort.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding & Cycle Plan

  - [**Primary Goal:** Onboard new team members (Tamyres, Sergey, Isaac) through hands-on pairing sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Ticket Assignment:** New members will not take on solo tickets this cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**On-Call Role:** A lighter workload allows the on-call engineer (Kirkland) to provide immediate support for critical bugs or new client requests.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [**Local Setup:** New members must install the local development environment (Atlas) to participate in pairing and debugging.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

### Agentic Pipeline Migration

  - [**Status:** The multi-month migration of client workflows to an agentic model is nearly complete.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [**Blocker:** A few tickets are pending client feedback for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Decision:** All pending tickets will be closed by EOW if no feedback is received.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This clears the backlog and removes the mental overhead of tracking unfinished work.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
      - [**Action:** Clients will be notified that they must file a new, reprioritized ticket if they still need the work.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Framer Publishing Workflow

  - [**Issue:** A workflow for publishing content to Framer is intermittently failing, causing confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [**Symptoms:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Intermittent Failures:** The workflow fails unpredictably.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**False Negatives:** The workflow sometimes fails in Atlas but successfully publishes the content to Framer.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
      - [**Long Run Times:** One instance ran for 98 minutes, likely due to a timeout loop.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Hypotheses:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**User Error:** The delivery team may not be keeping the Framer MCP plugin open, which is required for the workflow to connect.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
      - [**Workflow Bug:** The workflow may be failing to parse the success message from Framer, leading to a false negative status in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [**Action:** Kirkland will meet with the delivery team to observe their process and rule out user error before debugging the workflow itself.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### New Tech Adoption

  - [**"Nano Banana" Image Generation:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Performance:** The new workflow produces high-quality, on-brand infographics with consistent logos and colors.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** Requires only a prompt, reference images, and brand colors—no HTML or complex setup.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
      - [**Goal:** Identify clients who can benefit from this workflow to improve efficiency and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [**Content Gap Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Need:** A workflow to research competitor pages for a given keyword and generate a report.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [**Status:** Unclear if this is already covered by the "Pages Inventory" feature in development. Kirkland will ask Daniel for clarification.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Pairing Opportunities

  - [Kirkland will schedule pairing sessions for new members on these tickets:](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Sunbit:** Generate case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Sanity:** Update a publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
      - [**Tag:** Add writing guidelines as an input to a translation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Marcus will pair with a new member on the Sanity ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kirkland:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)
      - [Schedule pairing sessions for new members.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Meet with the delivery team (Bailey) to debug the Framer workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
      - [Ask Daniel about the scope of the "Pages Inventory" feature.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)
      - [Ask Andy to identify clients for the new "Nano Banana" workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [**Marcus:**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
      - [Pair with a new member on the Sanity publishing workflow ticket.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [**New Members (Tamyres, Sergey, Isaac):**](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [Complete local development environment (Atlas) setup.](https://fathom.video/share/tyK71gHttyJ9fanf9Q4DTF8afxJdwQp8?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
